reviews.review_description: This Game had a lot of cool stuff to it and honestly was one of the first games I played on my headset, the game truly had a place in my heart. I don't even care if you guys don't update it, me and my friend yuh13 really liked that game and I lost my long worked for cosmetics. Please pleaaase let the game come back to life. -Jameson

developer_response.body: You can still play the Beta thingy ive put for it for you guys, but developing the game effected my mental health and i was not happy working on it. I hope you guys understand.
